name: Gundam Girl Studio for VRChat and Vroid
short_description: Robot Studio just helps you to make your own 3D robot avatars easily for VRChat. The avatars generated could also be used in VRM compatible softwares such as VSeeface
detailed_description:
Robot Girl Studio just helps you to make your own 3D female robot avatars easily for VRChat.
The avatars generated could also be used in VRM compatible softwares such as VSeeface

Robot Girl Studioは、VRChat用の3D女性ロボットアバターを簡単に作成することができます。
作成したアバターはVSeefaceなどのVRM互換ソフトでも使用できます。

We also have Animal Avatar Maker for VRChat Vroid VRM and Cluster


Remember to config blendshape clips of the avatars in Unity before using the avatars in vTuber tools

Our discord:
